name: Smoked Carpaccio with Grilled Potato, Asparagus and Watercress
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces red bliss potato, cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the fillet with dry rub and set aside.
2. Mix the remaining dry rub with butter and spread on each potato half.
3. Spread butter on asparagus spears.
4. Heat grill to 375°F (190°C).
5. Cook potatoes for 15 minutes, placing a water tray inside and adding soaked wood chips to create smoke.
6. Add beef fillet to the grill and cook for 25 minutes.
7. Add asparagus and cook for an additional 15 minutes.
8. Remove meat and vegetables from the grill.
9. Slice the meat thinly.
10. Serve slices on top of watercress, accompanied by cooked vegetables and Dijon mustard.
